name: keystore-infra
description: Source-only C/Objective-C++ OS-keychain core (macOS Keychain + Secure-Enclave biometric ACL; libsecret / Credential Manager stubs). No binary release; consumers compile it inline: the proteus daemon (packages/proteus-builder), the node:smol-keychain builtin (node-smol-builder additions), and a .node addon. Mirrors tui-infra / temporal-infra.
